task_attachments_kind_shape.name: task_attachments_kind_shape
task_attachments_kind_shape.value:
("task_attachments"."kind" = 'FILE' AND "task_attachments"."storage_key" IS NOT NULL AND "task_attachments"."mime_type" IS NOT NULL AND "task_attachments"."size_bytes" IS NOT NULL AND "task_attachments"."url" IS NULL)
       OR ("task_attachments"."kind" = 'LINK' AND "task_attachments"."url" IS NOT NULL AND "task_attachments"."storage_key" IS NULL AND "task_attachments"."mime_type" IS NULL AND "task_attachments"."size_bytes" IS NULL)
